question: For the online platform, which interpretation best reflects what can (and cannot) be inferred from the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q4 has the highest number of complaints received in absolute terms compared to the other quarters.
options.B: The combined height of all segments in each bar shows how the platform’s overall activity changes across the year.
options.C: Each metric follows the same trend across quarters because all bars reach 100%.
options.D: Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking comparisons based on percentages, but not cross-quarter comparisons of absolute quantities for any metric.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
